support_basis: provider + required image nodes; optional CodeFormer and SeedVR2 paths are independently gated

reasons.comfy_utility_graph_available: Comfy provider can queue the standalone Image Upscale utility graph from any Image-tab context. This feature consumes an existing image and does not depend on SDXL/Flux/Qwen/ZImage/checkpoint/GGUF compiler routes.
reasons.non_comfy_provider_gated: Provider does not have a confirmed V2 upload + Comfy-style image utility graph queue bridge for Image Upscale.
reasons.not_image_workspace: Image Upscale is an Image workspace utility and is not mounted outside the Image tab.
reasons.finish_mount_only: Image Upscale can be launched globally from Image outputs; the direct control panel may stage the selected image into Image → Finish for review.
reasons.missing_required_nodes: Required Comfy image utility nodes are missing; queueing must be gated until LoadImage, ImageScaleBy, and SaveImage are available.
reasons.missing_optional_model_nodes: Model upscale nodes are missing; interpolation-only upscale remains available, but the model-upscale control/path must be disabled.
reasons.missing_optional_codeformer_nodes: CodeFormer restore nodes are missing; normal upscale remains available, but CodeFormer controls/path must be disabled.
reasons.unknown_route: No explicit Image Upscale support row matched; defaulting to provider-gated for safety.
reasons.missing_optional_seedvr2_nodes: SeedVR2 experimental engine requires ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler nodes: SeedVR2LoadDiTModel, SeedVR2LoadVAEModel, SeedVR2VideoUpscaler.
reasons.seedvr2_model_folder: SeedVR2 models are expected in ComfyUI/models/SEEDVR2/ or can auto-download on first node use when the custom node supports it.
